tutorialWelcomeDesc: Your ultimate learning companion for high school studies. Let's take a quick tour to help you get started!
tutorialSubjectsDesc: Browse through your subjects and chapters. Each chapter contains questions, answers, resources, and study materials organized for easy learning.
tutorialQuestionsDesc: Have a question? Ask it in any chapter! You can also help others by answering their questions. Collaborate and learn together with your classmates.
tutorialFlashcardsDesc: Create flashcard sets to memorize important concepts. Use spaced repetition to study efficiently and retain information longer.
noAnswersYet: No answers yet. Be the first to share your knowledge!

landingSubtitle: The ultimate platform for high school students to collaborate, learn, and excel together.
landingFeature1Desc: Organized content across all subjects with chapters and study materials
landingFeature2Desc: Ask questions and get answers from classmates and teachers
landingFeature3Desc: Create flashcards with spaced repetition for efficient learning
landingFeature4Desc: Find any content across subjects, chapters, and resources instantly
